trace_target.label: Story 2.1 — Bootstrap per-folder LICENSE.yml + regenerate LICENSES.md (data-hygiene fixes included)

requirements.title: main/util/LICENSE.yml enumerates every vendored library under main/util/ (live + _unused/)

tests.title: git show d66b8d5:main/util/LICENSE.yml parses as YAML; 14 entries total (9 live: HullPolygon.ts, clipper.js, geometryutil.js, interact.js, parallel.js, pathsegpolyfill.js, ractive.js, simplify.js, svgpanzoom.js + 5 _unused/: clippernode.js, filesaver.js, hull.js, json.js, placementworker.js)
All 14 entries carry valid SPDX license IDs (BSL-1.0, MIT, ISC, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, LicenseRef-PublicDomain) — Sage Round-1 pre-flight verified vs SPDX 2.3 §10.1
ls main/util/ at d66b8d5 returns the 14 audited files plus 6 first-party *.ts (domparser, eval, matrix, point, vector) — Sage cross-checked PR body's vendored-vs-first-party adjudication block

requirements.title: main/font/LICENSE.yml enumerates post-Story-1.1 live Lato webfont kit (6 woff/woff2 + 1 css)

tests.title: git show d66b8d5:main/font/LICENSE.yml parses as YAML; 7 entries (LatoLatin-{Bold,Light,Regular}.{woff,woff2} × 6 + latolatinfonts.css × 1) — all SIL OFL-1.1 attribution to Łukasz Dziedzic / tyPoland Sp. z o.o.

Zero entries for any file removed in Story 1.1 (BoldItalic kit, lato-{hai,lig}-* demo kit, *.eot/*.ttf for live weights, stylesheet.css, specimen_files/, generator_config.txt) — cross-check vs docs/asset-inventory.md §6 Status:removed

requirements.title: Five VP-found data-hygiene fixes resolved in bootstrap LICENSES.md

tests.title: (a) /main/uitil/filesaver.js → /main/util/_unused/filesaver.js — typo fixed AND path corrected to _unused/ subdirectory
(b) /main/util/clipper → /main/util/clipper.js — extension added to match live file
(d) /main/svgnest.js row removed; ls main/svgnest.js confirms file does not exist in tree at d66b8d5

(e) Three '?' copyright placeholders replaced with concrete attributions: svgparser.js → 'Copyright (c) 2015 Jack Qiao (svgnest origin)'; deepnest.js → 'Copyright (c) 2018 Daniel Sagor and Deepnest contributors (deepnest.io); fork of SVGnest by Jack Qiao'; svgnest.js placeholder dropped via (d). grep -n '?' LICENSES.md returns no row-level matches.

requirements.title: Bootstrap LICENSES.md matches convention (Story 2.2's byte-for-byte regression target)

tests.title: Top-of-file header sentence ('This software contains different units with different licenses, copyrights and authors.') preserved verbatim
Existing markdown table shape '| Unit | License | Copyright |' preserved (column-rename-only nit: trailing space normalisation)

28 data rows total = 5 first-party (/main, /main/svgparser.js, /main/deepnest.js, minkowski.cc/h, /polygon) grouped first + 23 third-party rows alphabetical by Unit path — matches PR body claim and Sage pre-flight ASCII-sort verification (_ < a < {letters}; HullPolygon.ts before _unused/...)
LF-only (32 LF, 0 CRLF), single trailing newline — Sage pre-flight 'tail -c 5 | od -c' confirms

Every entry across the 3 LICENSE.yml files (14 + 7 + 2 = 23) appears exactly once as a row in LICENSES.md (third-party block), modulo the 5 first-party rows preserved verbatim — Story 2.2 generator's regression target

recommendations.action: Carry-forward to Story 2.2 spec (DEE-90): codify generator handling for in-installer-but-out-of-tree first-party rows (resolves Sage Round-1 P2-01 architectural tension between AC-02.1.5 and ADR-008 §271). DEE-90 already created.
Carry-forward to Story 2.2 spec (DEE-90): SPDX normalisation pass — Boost → BSL-1.0, GPLv3 → GPL-3.0-only — bundle with the passthrough decision (deduped Vitra Finding 2 + Lydia Finding 1, P3-01)
Carry-forward to Story 2.2 spec (DEE-90): latolatinfonts.css row placement — adopt schema flag (first_party: true) so the generator emits the row in the first-party block (Lydia Finding 2, P3-02)

Carry-forward to Story 2.2 spec (DEE-90): consolidate the per-folder LICENSE.yml schema spec to a single source (ADR-008 amendment or docs/license-yml-schema.md) and reduce per-file headers to a one-line reference (Vitra Finding 3, P3-03)

Carry-forward to Story 2.2 spec (DEE-90): scope decision on tests/assets/.fixture-manifest.json — explicit allow-list of fixture file extensions vs full-directory walk (Story 2.1 ↔ Story 3.1 interaction surfaced in cf831f2 commit body)
